title: Variated
description: Just a few blocks that get random textures
body:
This resource pack gives certain blocks randomized textures in game. Thats all there is to it. Those blocks are:

- Randomly Rotated Sunflowers
- Bookshelves
- Unpolished Stones
- Terracotta
- Stone
- Planks
- Mycelium
- Gravel
- End Stone
- Nylium
- Red Mushroom Blocks
- Birch logs
- Bricks
- Moss
- Cobblestone
- Grass
- Coarse Dirt
- Dirt

Some textures provided by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
